/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Chapter13_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Chapter13.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/GUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Simple_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Chapter13.dir/Colormap.cpp.o -o Chapter13 -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
